programme.desc: A security guard says he was promised a 100% return on his investment of $5K in cryptocurrency; instead, his financial advisor says when the market crashed, so did all payout returns.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A disgruntled tenant seeks the $10K court maximum, accusing her landlord of reneging on a deal to sell her mobile home; allegedly falsified documents and an illegal eviction come into play.

programme.desc: A fight between a house flipper and his neighbor over their shared driveway involves guns.

programme.desc: A woman claims she did not expect body-sculpting injections into her buttocks; she sues for allegedly false advertising and for emotional distress.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: A rescue pit bull described as gentle and well-behaved is beaten with a shovel to release a poodle from its mouth; the poodle's owner is also attacked and sues for $7K in medical bills and pain and suffering.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: Two childhood friends, a previous pro-boxer turned entrepreneur and a graphic designer, accuse each other of business sabotage, betrayal, and unpaid rent as they fight over $13K; tensions run high requiring intervention from both of the bailiffs.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: Both parties sue for the $10,000 court max in a fight over a hookah lounge that allegedly caused intense, physical stress to its upstairs neighbor; the lounge owner claims the neighbor harassed customers and repeatedly called the police.

programme.title: The Price Is Right Tonight
programme.desc: Howie Mandel hosts another dream-making night on the iconic stage.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Anchored by Lester Holt, "Dateline" is NBC's signature newsmagazine, bringing viewers storytelling at its best by putting the pieces together to present the full picture of real-life events. NBC News correspondents cover compelling stories and issues of the day, ranging from mystery and crime to in-depth investigations and breaking-news events.

programme.title: CityNews Tonight Toronto
programme.desc: Coverage of the day's top news stories.

programme.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
programme.desc: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.
